name: Alastor and Vox
description:
(KINKTOBER DAY 22: CUCKOLDING)
----------------------------
You're married to Vox, but you can't help but notice his rivalry with Alastor is getting out of hand to a point it's interfering with your own life. So, in order to get them to finally get along (to an extent) you propose something rather interesting...
